data.body:
DECOMPOSITION + CERTIFICATION (2026-06, local build)

Decomposed this epic into 6 child stories (deps captured as WS-aligned epic ACs), sequenced via depends_on:
- WS1 8e6f-3ad2-1f24-4b8b (low-cloud-wreck) — diff context-assembler + base reviewer (recommend_overlays). READY (no blockers).
- WS2 8e78-d515-3a98-4eba (make-rant-buoy) — overlay catalog + finder/verify/coach prompts + code move-catalog. dep WS1.
- WS3 8855-e5f9-05b4-4a04 (crow-knelt-fiber) — overlay_union + merge_findings ops + gates/code-review.yaml. dep WS2.
- WS4 98ff-d3b8-d2f7-4a86 (side-haiku-dew) — gate_dispatch.produce_code_review_verdict + source-separation. dep WS3.
- WS5 bba6-69b9-b9d4-4ac0 (corn-pub-oat) — secrets/security detectors (fail-closed) behind the oracle envelope. dep WS3.
- WS6 4119-1a4f-19ff-4cfa (virid-trench-stone) — Gerrit LLM-Review voter + dogfood. dep WS4; gated on d251.
Each child carries file_impact + verify_commands. WS1-WS5 are unblocked today; WS6 awaits d251-05e1-eb55-43b2.

CERTIFICATION: ran the four-pass plan-review (local build, --source local) on the epic + all 6 children. ALL SEVEN VERDICT=PASS, zero blocking findings, no Layer-1 floor failures. Advisories were all minor/none (non-blocking). Store validate: no critical/major findings introduced; sibling depends_on links landed at story level (no mis-promotion).

REMEDIATION: applied the substantive advisories across epic + children — overlay-id enum ownership (WS1 owns the enum, WS2 the content); the 'CI drift gate' defined as a concrete observable (rebar workflow validate + prompt-index drift check); concrete threshold defaults (DEFAULT_BLOCK_THRESHOLD=0.95, advisory by default, blocking only for secrets/security); a registered typed code_review_verdict schema + REVIEW_RESULT sidecar; fail-closed = BLOCK (coverage-gap attached to the blocking vote); Gerrit label/auth/copyCondition/vote-mapping deferred to d251; a back-out plan for the destructive single-pass retirement (flag-off default + re-export shim). A post-remediation re-run (epic+WS2+WS4) re-confirmed PASS; residual advisories are non-blocking AC-phrasing nitpicks left intentionally (the gate is a structural floor, not a semantic score — over-fitting the finder would bloat the tickets without improving implementability).
